<details>
<summary><strong>Metric definitions</strong></summary>

- **Unregistered** — TODO comments without an issue key that would be registered
- **New issues** — new tracker tickets that would be created (`registered - glued`)
- **Glued** — TODOs that would reuse an existing issue key

</details>
